title: Use binary pattern matching for command prefixes
prompt: Rewrite MyApp.CommandParser.parse/1 from test_fixtures/string_prefix_regex.ex using binary pattern matching in the function head: `def parse(<<"SET ", rest::binary>>)`, etc. Include heads for SET, GET, DEL, PING. Add a catch-all returning `{:error, :unknown}`. Do not use `String.starts_with?/2` or `String.slice/3`. Output a complete `defmodule MyApp.CommandParser do ... end`.
tier_rationale: Canonical binary-prefix pattern. Well-known single-direction rewrite.
